name: Sylia
short_description: Pets vs Aliens! When your heroes are not good enough, all hope seems lost... not yet! Two faithful companions kickstart the revolt and try to confront Lady Godiva, the mysterious Queen of the Aliens. Tired of the same old formula? Sylia is an RPG like no other!
detailed_description:
Presentation

Three gigantic and mysterious Cubes have landed on Sylia's main islands.
Inside them, unknown creatures (… Aliens) are gathered and plot on how to take control of the lands and ultimately extract the planet's energy – that would be the end of all life.

Is Sylia a realm about to fall? Maybe not!
A group of heroes is not willing to let that happen! They are Sylia's finest knight, wizardress, cleric and warrior. Supported and guided by their nation, they must enter the Cube where the Aliens' Queen (a mysterious woman going by the name of Lady Godiva) is and stop her!

But the task seems overwhelming… too overwhelming... Who is going to win the fight for Sylia? Will the land thrive or will the Aliens gain its energy and destroy every life form in the process? A cute dog, a witty cat and a crazy rooster have a say on it!

Best-selling Games by Aldorlea Available on Steam
